$schema.description: Optional URL of the JSON Schema this file conforms to. Editor-only hint (VS Code, JetBrains, …) so completions and diagnostics light up; graphdo-ts itself ignores the field — `config_version` is the on-disk version discriminator.

config_version.description: On-disk schema version discriminator. Files with a higher value than the running build supports are rejected (never silently downgraded).

list_id.description: Microsoft Graph todoTaskList id. Opaque token: must not contain `/`, `\`, or whitespace.

list_name.description: Display name of the selected list. Cached so `auth_status` can show it without an extra Graph round-trip.

root_folder_id.description: OneDrive driveItem id of a single top-level workspace folder. Opaque token: must not equal `/`, contain `/`, `\`, or whitespace.

root_folder_path.description: Display-only path (e.g. `/Notes`). Never used to address the folder; the `root_folder_id` is the source of truth.

title: graphdo-ts config (v2)
description: Versioned snake_case on-disk shape of `config.json`. Written by graphdo-ts ≥ the release that introduced ADR-0009 / ADR-0010. Generated from the Zod source of truth in `src/config.ts` by `scripts/generate-schemas.ts`; do not edit by hand.
